source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage, Crane, Other Lifting

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, West Delta Block 30

event.top_event: Loss of Containment - Pin Hole Leak in Gas Compressor Inlet Piping
actions_taken: Personnel dispatched by field boat to investigate loss of production
Pressure Safety Low (PSL) activated automatic shutdown of gas compressor, LP separator, and 9 LP wells
Variance requested from BSEE to install temporary 6-inch, 2000 psi clamp
event.summary: On 09 January 2021 at approximately 0600 hours, a pin hole leak developed in the inlet suction piping of the gas compressor on West Delta 30 Platform P. The leak activated the Pressure Safety Low (PSL) system, which automatically shut down the gas compressor, LP separator, and all nine LP production wells. The leak was caused by excessive corrosion resulting from Cox's failure to maintain protective coatings on the process piping. No loss of containment or pollution was observed. A temporary clamp was installed with BSEE approval and the platform was returned to production within 4 hours.

hazards.name: Pressurized gas in compressor inlet piping

threats.name: Coating degradation and corrosion of process piping
Loss of piping wall thickness and structural integrity
Pin hole leak in pressurized piping

controls.name: Protective coating system on process piping
controls.lod_basis: Primary barrier to prevent corrosion initiation

supporting_text: Cox failed to maintain coatings on the process piping
The photos indicated corrosion and a failure of the piping coating system in the place where the leak occurred

controls.name: Preventive maintenance program for piping integrity
controls.barrier_role: Maintain coating integrity and detect degradation
controls.lod_basis: Planned maintenance to prevent coating failure

supporting_text: Equipment Failure - Inadequate preventive maintenance - Cox failed to maintain pipe coatings which caused corrosion

controls.name: Pressure Safety Low (PSL) system on gas compressor suction
controls.barrier_role: Detect pressure loss and activate automatic shutdown
controls.lod_basis: Automatic detection and response to loss of pressure

supporting_text: The operator investigated the Pressure Safety Low (PSL) on the suction inlet that the tripped on the panel
The pin hole leak in the inlet suction piping of the gas compressor activated the PSL which shut in the Gas Compressor, LP Separator, and the 9 LP production wells
the platform safety system performed as designed in accordance with the regulations

controls.name: Emergency Shut Down (ESD) System
controls.lod_basis: Backup shutdown system for emergency response

supporting_text: Upon arrival, personnel found the fuel gas scrubber, gas generator, and the Emergency Shut Down (ESD) System were still in service

controls.name: SCADA System monitoring at remote control room
controls.barrier_role: Detect loss of production and alert operators
controls.lod_basis: Remote monitoring and early detection of operational anomalies

supporting_text: the control room operators monitoring the Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) System located at WD 31 E, noticed a loss of production at WD 30 P
The Person In Charge (PIC) sent personnel by field boat to investigate the loss of production

controls.name: Field investigation and inspection by personnel
controls.barrier_role: Identify root cause and prevent further damage
controls.lod_basis: Manual investigation and assessment of operational issues

supporting_text: Upon arrival, personnel found the fuel gas scrubber, gas generator, and the Emergency Shut Down (ESD) System were still in service
The operator investigated the Pressure Safety Low (PSL) on the suction inlet that the tripped on the panel. He heard the gas leak and found a pin hole in the inlet suction piping to the compressor
